message:
feat(web): add 7 middleware components and content negotiation module

Major middleware expansion (+1194 lines) closing web framework parity
gaps MW-G2, MW-G5, MW-G6, MW-G8, MW-G9:

New middleware:
- CompressionMiddleware: Accept-Encoding negotiation with Vary header
  management (identity-only for now, wired for future gzip/deflate)
- RequestBodyLimitMiddleware: global request body size enforcement
  returning 413 Payload Too Large when exceeded
- RequestIdMiddleware: generates or propagates x-request-id headers via
  monotonic AtomicU64 counter, stores ID in request extensions
- AuthMiddleware: bearer-token authorization with AnyBearer and
  ExactBearer policies, 401 + WWW-Authenticate on failure
- LoadShedMiddleware: atomic in-flight counter with RAII guard, returns
  503 Service Unavailable when capacity is exceeded
- CatchPanicMiddleware: catches handler panics via catch_unwind, returns
  500 without leaking implementation details
- NormalizePathMiddleware: trailing-slash strategies (Trim, Always,
  RedirectTrim, RedirectAlways) with 301 redirect support
- SetResponseHeaderMiddleware: injects response headers with Always or
  IfMissing overwrite semantics

Also adds append_vary_header() helper and modernizes CORS middleware
with Duration::from_mins() and let-else syntax.

src/web/negotiate.rs (new): HTTP content negotiation with full Accept
header parsing including quality values, wildcard matching, tiebreaking,
and ErrorHandlerMiddleware for panic-safe error responses formatted as
JSON/HTML/text based on client Accept preference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
